bio.description1: I am an LLM Engineer with experience in AI agent training and deployment frameworks. I graduated with a Master's Degree in Telecommunications Engineering from UPNA in 2025. Thanks to my experience deploying AI models and the knowledge I acquired at university in network management, I have a strong understanding of IT service deployments, particularly those involving Large Language Models (LLMs).
bio.description2: Analytical, honest, and self-critical. I strive to maintain an internal locus of control and face life's challenges by focusing on what I can change while accepting what I cannot.
bio.description3: I want to use the skills I have acquired, and that have been made possible by the many people who have shaped my perspective on life, to help others. At the same time, I aim to continue developing these talents and realizing my potential for as long as time allows.
timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.university1.title: Beginning of the Telecommunications Engineering Degree at UPNA
timeline.university1.desc: During my Telecommunications Engineering degree, I learned how modern communication technologies work, ranging from analog systems based on antennas and optical fibers to digital communications and networking protocols such as HTTP/S, RTSP, and IPsec. This was also my first contact with programming, where I worked with languages such as Java, Python, and C++.
timeline.university2.title: Completion of the Degree at the University of Coimbra
timeline.university2.desc: I completed my Telecommunications Engineering degree at the University of Coimbra through the Erasmus program. During this period, I presented my Bachelor's Thesis, which focused on analyzing the behavior of mechanical motors through frequency-domain components extracted from engine vibrations.
timeline.university3.title: Beginning of the Master's Degree in Telecommunications Engineering at UPNA
timeline.university3.desc: This master's program marked my first serious exposure to Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence. My initial experience involved developing a project for automatic vehicle license plate detection and recognition, which sparked my interest in the field.
timeline.university4.title: Master's Degree Completion
timeline.university4.desc: I completed my Master's Degree through a computer vision project focused on hand detection and behavioral pattern recognition while a person is eating. During this work, I gained practical experience using architectures such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for computer vision applications.
timeline.university5.title: Working at Tafco Metawireless
timeline.university5.desc: During my time at Tafco Metawireless, I have had the opportunity to work with cutting-edge AI technologies, focusing primarily on Large Language Models (LLMs) and custom software development. I have contributed to two major projects: a WhatsApp-based chat center and the adaptation of an LLM for company-specific use cases. As shown in the accompanying image, these AI systems can dynamically access real-time data and generate visualizations on demand.
timeline.university6.title: While Continuing My Work at Tafco...
timeline.university6.desc: I continue to take on new projects and challenges to further develop my skills and expand my expertise.
essay.motto: One of my guiding principles: If a problem does not require AI, do not use it.
